posts.text: Nearly $600 million in Medicare billing was tied to the provider number of an 87-year-old doctor over five years, according to a Fox News investigation. After questions were raised, Medicare revoked his billing privileges.
posts.quote: Nearly $600 million in Medicare billing was tied to the provider number of an 87-year-old doctor over five years, according to a Fox News investigation. After questions were raised, Medicare revoked his billing privileges.

posts.text: An armed man rammed a vehicle into Temple Israel in West Bloomfield, Michigan, and was fatally shot by synagogue security. Authorities say no children or staff were injured, though one security officer was struck by the vehicle and is not in life-threatening condition.
posts.quote: An armed man rammed a vehicle into Temple Israel in West Bloomfield, Michigan, and was fatally shot by synagogue security. Authorities say no children or staff were injured, though one security officer was struck by the vehicle and is not in life-threatening condition.

posts.text: Tonight on @SpecialReport I am joined by blackrock CEO Larry Fink to discuss the stock market, the economy, the US-China competition, AI (is it coming for your job?) and more #FoxNews #SpecialReport #AI #Jobs #Economy

posts.text: “The Strait of Hormuz isn’t going to be a problem even though it’s a complex issue,” Bret Baier weighs in before President Trump speaks in Kentucky about lowering prices.
posts.quote: “The Strait of Hormuz isn’t going to be a problem even though it’s a complex issue,” Bret Baier weighs in before President Trump speaks in Kentucky about lowering prices.

posts.text: Trump: “If we waited three days, we would have been attacked.” The White House briefed reporters this afternoon on Iran strikes and oil prices. @jacquiheinrich reports.
posts.quote: Trump: “If we waited three days, we would have been attacked.” The White House briefed reporters this afternoon on Iran strikes and oil prices. @jacquiheinrich reports.

posts.text: Good morning-- a beautiful day in DC today and on with @americasnewsroom. Thanks for having me @danaperino and @bmelugin33 #FoxNews #Iran #News

posts.text: Federal and local authorities investigate after two IEDs were allegedly thrown at a protest outside NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s residence. Authorities say the suspects referenced ISIS after their arrest. @cbcottontv reports.
posts.quote: Federal and local authorities investigate after two IEDs were allegedly thrown at a protest outside NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s residence. Authorities say the suspects referenced ISIS after their arrest. @cbcottontv reports.

posts.text: Correspondent @foymeetsworlddd reports from Tel Aviv as Mojtaba Khamenei has been named Iran’s new Supreme Leader following his father’s killing. The move places him at the head of Iran’s military and nuclear decision-making during an escalating conflict.
